name: 7.5 ML Nasal Spray
about: The 7.5 ML Nasal Spray is a general medicine that comes in a liquid form and is designed to provide relief from nasal congestion. The medicine is produced in India and is supplied, exported, and traded by the manufacturer. The 7.5 ML dosage form is ideal for single-use and can provide quick relief from nasal discharge, runny nose, and sneezing. The medicine is stored in a dry place to ensure its efficacy and longevity. The spray is easy to use and can be administered by anyone without any special medical training. The drug type of the medicine is general, which means it is suitable for all ages and can be used for a variety of symptoms. The dosage form of the medicine is spray, which is a convenient way to deliver the medicine directly to the nasal cavity.

faq.a: The dosage of the 7.5 ML Nasal Spray is 7.5 ML.

faq.a: The medicine should be stored in a dry place to ensure its efficacy and longevity.

faq.a: The medicine should be administered through the nasal cavity using the spray form. It is easy to use and can be administered by anyone without any special medical training.
